### Ran Playwright code
```js
await (async (page) => {
  return await page.evaluate(() => {
    const frags = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('include-fragment, [src], [data-url]')).slice(0,200).map(el => ({tag: el.tagName, src: el.getAttribute('src'), dataUrl: el.getAttribute('data-url'), id: el.id, cls: el.className}));
    const mainText = document.querySelector('main')?.innerText?.slice(0,500) || '';
    return {fragCount: frags.length, frags: frags.filter(f=>f.src||f.dataUrl).slice(0,30), mainText};
  });
})(page);
```

metadata.description: Fetch contributor stats from GitHub API

input.command: uv run python -c "import json,urllib.request; react=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen('https://api.github.com/repos/facebook/react/contributors?per_page=1')); rn=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen('https://api.github.com/repos/facebook/react-native/contributors?per_page=100')); top=react[0]; login=top['login']; commits=top['contributions']; rank=next((i for i,u in enumerate(rn[:30],1) if u.get('login')==login),'N/A'); print(json.dumps({'top':login,'commits':commits,'in_rn':rank!='N/A','rank':rank}))"
